import boto3
import redis
from pymongo import MongoClient
from elasticsearch import Elasticsearch
from functools import lru_cache

@lru_cache(maxsize=1)
def get_s3_client():
    return boto3.client("s3", region_name="us-east-1")

@lru_cache(maxsize=1)
def get_redis_client():
    return redis.Redis(host="localhost", port=6379, db=0)

@lru_cache(maxsize=1)
def get_mongo_client():
    return MongoClient("mongodb://localhost:27017")

@lru_cache(maxsize=1)
def get_es_client():
    return Elasticsearch(["http://localhost:9200"])

def upload_file(bucket: str, key: str, data: bytes) -> None:
    client = get_s3_client()
    client.put_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=key, Body=data)

def cache_set(key: str, value: str, ttl: int = 3600) -> None:
    client = get_redis_client()
    client.setex(key, ttl, value)

def insert_document(collection: str, doc: dict) -> None:
    client = get_mongo_client()
    client["mydb"][collection].insert_one(doc)

def search_index(index: str, query: dict) -> dict:
    client = get_es_client()
    return client.search(index=index, body=query)
